Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Steel Avalanche]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Steel Avalanche is a new member of the Advocates’ Low Council.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Steel Avalanche wears a blue-and-white uniform with the Advocate ‘A’ and silver Aethertech gauntlets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Steel Avalanche is a fighter who can punch people into ceilings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Steel Avalanche is a real fighter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 23''' — Steel Avalanche is a broad, gray-bearded human and an enemy of the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 23''' — Steel Avalanche wears Aethertech gauntlets that cover him from the forearms down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — Steel Avalanche is a gray-bearded human and an Advocate High Councilor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — Steel Avalanche is a gray-bearded man who once killed the Nebula Runners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — Steel Avalanche uses an Aethertech weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 42''' — Steel Avalanche is an Advocate who expressed approval of Starhammer's speech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 49''' — Steel Avalanche would have killed the narrator if given the chance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Steel Avalanche is a guard who dislikes watching prisoners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Steel Avalanche uses gauntlets that emit sapphire light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — Steel Avalanche has a Combat Art that allows him to direct the force of his punches.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Steel Avalanche was killed in a conflict with the Zenith Device.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
